success.title: Payment is being verified
success.body: Returning from checkout does not credit the wallet by itself. The backend updates the wallet only after provider verification.

cancel.title: Payment was not completed
cancel.body: No wallet credit is applied from this return page. You can check your wallet or start another top-up.

pending.title: Payment verification pending
pending.body: The payment status may still be processing. Wallet balance changes only after the provider status is verified.

refreshError: Payment status could not be refreshed.
verified: Payment verified and wallet credit recorded.
openHistory: Open your wallet history to review the final status.
signInToRefresh: Sign in to refresh payment status from this page.
